panels.description: Wide shot: Mowgli stands in the dark jungle, moonlight illuminating his face covered in blood and tears, Shere Khan's hide visible under his feet, intense dramatic shadows, expression of tragic confusion and resilience.

bubbles.text: My mouth is bleeding. The Man-Pack have cast me out. Why?

panels.description: Medium shot: Limmershin, a small Winter Wren, perched on the rigging of a wooden steamer, Bering Sea in the background, cold atmospheric lighting.

bubbles.text: Limmershin the wren told me this tale of Novastoshnah, where the seals gather.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Sea Catch, a massive scarred fur seal with a thick mane, standing on his front flippers, wicked teeth exposed, aggressive posture, low angle.
Action shot: Sea Catch lunging forward with lightning speed at an unseen opponent, mouth open showing sharp teeth, dramatic blurred motion effect, dynamic angle.

bubbles.text: He was scarred with the marks of savage fights, always ready for one more.

panels.description: Wide panoramic shot: Hutchinson's Hill, thousands of fur seals filling the entire beach, chaotic fighting, surf crashing, misty Bering Sea horizon, sense of overwhelming scale.

bubbles.text: The whistling, bellowing, and roaring on the beach was something frightful.
